title: valerianella dentata f. leiosperma
intro: Valerianella dentata f. leiosperma, also known as Corn Spurry or Lesser Corn Spurry, is a small annual flowering plant that belongs to the family Valerianaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate digestive issues, such as irritable bowel syndrome and menstrual cramps. The health benefits of Valerianella dentata f. leiosperma include its ability to soothe anxiety and stress, promote relaxation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
